name: sail
description: Migrate inference, build observable agents, allocate preemptible GPU compute, and delegate coding work to Sail from your preferred coding agent.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate coding work and build agents on Sail
interface.longDescription: Migrate inference, build observable agents, allocate preemptible GPU compute, and delegate coding work to Sail from your preferred coding agent.
defaultPrompt: Use Sail Subs to delegate suitable scoped coding work.
Use Sail Review to review the current diff.
Use Sail Charter to give Sail ownership of the entire task.
